name: VF Snow Flurry HO
comment:
The VF Flurry is a highly efficient, 1250W Snow Machine. It has a spray distance of 2-5 meters. Features include: Low/High volume selection switch, low snow fluid shut off to protect the pump, snow fluid level indicator, 2.3 Liter internal snow fluid tank, and an On/Off switch on the rear panel. The VF Flurry uses water based snow fluid.
ADJ recommends SNOW GAL, snow juice that been specially formulated for ADJ snow machines.

capabilities.comment: Fan on snow output/ least output to most output
